feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to view or access CPI Audit Logs?
entry.content:
Hi CPI/BTP Experts,

I am currently trying to access the CPI Audit Log but cannot let it appear under my subscriptions.

My friend was able to show me a sample screenshot below of what it looks like:

 

Are the sap notes correct or event relevant?

3463319 - How to view IAS audit logs in Audit Log Viewer
3298228 - How to access SAP Audit Log Viewer Service

 

Let me know if I am looking at the correct notes, if not, let me know what the most relevant note is.

Thanks,

newcloudguy

entry.title: Second DEV Environment in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi all,

I want to create a second CF Space in a subaccount to develop a second version of our Apps, which we are publishing via SAP Build Work Zone to a Launchpad. Background while we are planning this like that, we want a stable version of our apps in production. In Case of an incident we want to be able to develop a fix for this stable version. Furthermore we want to develope a new version with much more features.

We are using SAP BTP ABAP Environment and RAP to develop our "Backend" Fiori Apps.

So my question:

I noticed that SAP Build Workzone in Space independent. Is there any Problem to use Apps with the same ID from different CF Spaces in another SAP Build Workzone Launchpad?

SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition

entry.title: LEAVE TO SCREEN 0 AFTER REFRESH ALV IS NOT WORKING
entry.content:
Hello everyone, it is the first time that I post in this community, and I hope I am doing it well.... I need some suggestion to solve a problem with an ABAP code, the detail is that I have an ALV that shows a list of data, and when I insert a new record, I call again to the routine so that the ALV shows the updated information, up to here everything works perfectly; but when pressing the back button, it does not return to the main page, but it loads again the previous screen, and it is reiterative according to the amount of operations that I make in the program. I have already tried making the adjustments in the User Command with the code LEAVE TO SCREEN 0, but it does not work... I hope you can help me...Here is my code...Thanks..!!!

 

FORM RECOVER_DATA.

  IMPORT gv_list    = gv_list FROM MEMORY ID 'F4_LIST'.
  IMPORT gv_module  = gv_module FROM MEMORY ID 'F4_MODULE'.

  CLEAR: tt_rdata[].
    ObjBenMto->GetMateriales(
      EXPORTING
        p_prm1 = p_lgort
        p_prm2 = gv_list
        p_prm3 = gv_module
      IMPORTING
        rtdat = tt_rdata ).

  " Calling the form to build the field catalog
  PERFORM BUILD_FIELDCAT USING lt_fieldcat.

ENDFORM.

FORM BUILD_FIELDCAT USING lt_fieldcat TYPE lvc_t_fcat.

  " Build the fieldcat for the ALV
  " ...
  " ..
  " .
  
  PERFORM PRINT_ALV.

ENDFORM.

FORM PRINT_ALV.

  ls_layout-zebra      = abap_true.
  ls_layout-cwidth_opt = abap_true.
  ls_layout-box_fname  = 'MANDT'.

  " Mostrar los datos en la grilla ALV
  CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY_LVC'
    EXPORTING
      i_structure_name          = 'TI_ALV'
      is_layout_lvc             = ls_layout
      it_fieldcat_lvc           = lt_fieldcat
      i_callback_program        = sy-repid
      i_callback_pf_status_set  = 'SET_STATUS_CABECERA'
      i_callback_user_command   = 'USER_COMMAND_CABECERA'
    TABLES
      t_outtab                  = tt_rdata
    EXCEPTIONS
      program_error             = 1
      OTHERS                    = 2.

  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'Error when processing the information' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.

ENDFORM.

FORM USER_COMMAND_CABECERA USING  pi_ucomm        TYPE sy-ucomm
                                  pi_wa_selfield  TYPE slis_selfield.

  CASE pi_ucomm.
    WHEN '&NEW'.  "New record
      CLEAR: txt_proc, txt_tipproc, txt_grupo, txt_material.
      IMPORT  gv_list_valor = gv_list_valor
              gv_list       = gv_list
              gv_id_item    = gv_id_item FROM MEMORY ID 'F4_LIST'.
      txt_almorigen = gv_lgort.
      txt_proc      = gv_list_valor.
      gv_list_valor = gv_list_valor.
      gv_list       = gv_list.
      gv_id_item    = gv_id_item.

      CALL SCREEN 1001  STARTING AT 10 5
                        ENDING AT 80 21.

    WHEN '&UPD'.  "Update record
      gv_id_item    = gv_id_item.

      PERFORM GET_ROWLIST USING pi_wa_selfield-tabindex.

      CALL SCREEN 1002  STARTING AT 10 5
                        ENDING AT 100 21.

    WHEN '&DEL'.  "Eliminar Registro

      PERFORM DELETE_DATA USING pi_wa_selfield-tabindex.

    WHEN '&LOA'.  "Upload xls
      CLEAR: txt_file.
      IMPORT  gv_list_valor = gv_list_valor
              gv_list       = gv_list FROM MEMORY ID 'F4_LIST'.
      txt_almorigenx  = gv_lgort.
      txt_listax      = gv_list_valor.
      gv_list_valor   = gv_list_valor.
      gv_list         = gv_list.
      gv_id_item      = gv_id_item.

      CALL SCREEN 1003  STARTING AT 10 5
                        ENDING AT 80 17.

    WHEN '&F03'. " Back
      SET SCREEN 0.
  ENDCASE.

  pi_wa_selfield-refresh    = 'X'.
  pi_wa_selfield-row_stable = 'X'.
  pi_wa_selfield-col_stable = 'X'.
  pi_wa_selfield-exit       = 'X'.

ENDFORM.

FORM NEW_DATA USING ptxt_almorigen  TYPE ZBI_BEN_S02-ALMORIGEN
                    ptxt_proc       TYPE ZBI_BEN_S01H-IDITEM
                    ptxt_tipproc    TYPE ZBI_BEN_S01D-VALORITEM
                    ptxt_grupo      TYPE ZBI_BEN_S02-GRUPO
                    ptxt_material   TYPE MAKT-MAKTX.

  DATA:   rv_cod      TYPE INT4,
          rv_msg      TYPE STRING,
          gv_msg      TYPE STRING.

  CLEAR: rv_cod, rv_msg, gv_msg.

  " User upload confirmation dialog box for upload confirmation
  CALL FUNCTION 'POPUP_TO_CONFIRM'
    EXPORTING
      titlebar      = 'New Record'
      text_question = '¿Are you sure to create the record?'
      text_button_1 = 'YES'
      icon_button_1 = 'ICON_OKAY'
      text_button_2 = 'NO'
      icon_button_2 = 'ICON_CANCEL'
    IMPORTING
      answer        = v_ans.

  IF v_ans NE 'A'.
    IF v_ans EQ '1'.
      ObjBenMto->NewData(
        EXPORTING
          p_prm1 = ptxt_almorigen
          p_prm2 = ptxt_proc
          p_prm3 = ptxt_tipproc
          p_prm4 = ptxt_material
          p_prm5 = ptxt_grupo
        IMPORTING
          lv_cod = rv_cod
          lv_msg = rv_msg ).

        IF rv_cod EQ 1.
          COMMIT WORK.
          MESSAGE rv_msg TYPE 'I'.
          PERFORM RECOVER_DATA. " Calling the Form to update the data from the ALV
        ELSE.
          ROLLBACK WORK.
          MESSAGE rv_msg TYPE 'I'.
        ENDIF.
    ELSE.
      ROLLBACK WORK.
    ENDIF.
  ELSE.
    ROLLBACK WORK.
    MESSAGE 'Process canceled by user' TYPE 'I'.
  ENDIF.

ENDFORM.

entry.title: API integration for PLANT master data
entry.content:
Hi gurus, hope all are doing good.

We have new integration project to integrate SAP with PROCOL. The requirement in front of me now is
to create API (ODATA) so that the user can CREATE (POST Method) and UPDATE ( PUT Method ) can be used
for PLANT Master Data. After doing some research I have found that like the way we have BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVE_DATA for material master
we don't have any such BAPI for PLANT master data.
How can I achieve functionality of creating API (ODATA)  for plant master data ?

entry.title: APIs for Warehousing - OData v4. Count Physical Inventory issue.
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am using the Physical Inventory API in my BTP Application and want to perform the COUNT as described in the link. Unfortunately, I am having some troubles with it, therefore I want to understand how it is supposed to work.

To be able to perform an Inventory COUNT I have to have a Inventory Document, which I created in my SAP EWM System as we can see below.

I notice that there exists a Physical Inventory Item ( Header Item ) for this document, but no Count Item ( since I did not perform the count yet ).

To perform the COUNT I implemented the BATCH call as mentioned in the Dokumentation and when I am executing it, I get following error:

"This physical inventory item doesn't exist."

This lead to my question: 

Since the BATCH call requires this two PUT calls in it.

How can the BATCH call require a PUT request of the Physical Inventory Count Item, if the Item does not exists yet?

entry.title: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills - /LRN/... courses
entry.content:
Hello,

I am taking 'Acquiring Core ABAP Skills' course at the moment.
I can't find /LRN/.. courses.
I checked the following posts:
https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-learning-q-a/acquiring-core-abap-skills-solutions-and-templates-name/qaq-p/1374739
https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-learning-q-a/query-related-learning-hub-course-acquiring-core-abap-skills/qaq-p/13687682
I tried using various search terms, but didn't help.
Any idea is appreciated.

Thanks
Laszlo

entry.title: SAP BTP - Applying Major Updates on Non-Production Subaccount
entry.content:
Hi all,

This is about the Major / Minor Updates / Upgrades that SAP provides on every month / quarterly basis. In order to have a better control and effectively manage the impact of this changes, can you please guide me on the below questions:

* Is there a way to apply the Updates / Releases on Non-Production Subaccount before the scheduled release date?

* Is there  a way to delay a release ? How to notify this to SAP?

entry.title: SAP BTP - Applying Major Updates on Non-Production Subaccount
entry.content:
Hi all,

This is about the Major / Minor Updates / Upgrades that SAP provides on every month / quarterly basis. In order to have a better control and effectively manage the impact of this changes, can you please guide me on the below questions:

* Is there a way to apply the Updates / Releases on Non-Production Subaccount before the scheduled release date?

* Is there  a way to delay a release ? How to notify this to SAP?

entry.title: Run NodeJS app locally using destination and connectivity services
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

lately I have been trying to create a NodeJS app using NestJS and the SAP Cloud SDK for javascript and deploy it to the cloud foundry runtime according to this example: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-sdk-js?tab=readme-ov-file

I created a new service, generated the odata client using an edmx file of our on premise service and deployed it. 

The deployed version is fine: I can read data and consume the odata service. 
In local mode the destination fails. 

I found this blogpost telling me how to check the connectivity of my destination. 
Using the curl request results in this:

 

curl -v -i "<destinationName>.dest/sap/opu/odata/iwfnd/catalogservice;v=2/ServiceCollection?%24top=1"
* Uses proxy env variable no_proxy == 'localhost,127.0.0.1,github.com,.github.com,.npmjs.org,.yarnpkg.com,npm.sap.com,.maven.apache.org,.repo-cache.svc.cluster.local'
* Uses proxy env variable http_proxy == 'http://127.0.0.1:8887'
*   Trying 127.0.0.1:8887...
* Connected to 127.0.0.1 (127.0.0.1) port 8887 (#0)
> GET http://<destinationName>.dest/sap/opu/odata/iwfnd/catalogservice;v=2/ServiceCollection?%24top=1 HTTP/1.1
> Host: sd_orca_sap_ecc_akab.dest
> User-Agent: curl/7.88.1
> Accept: */*
> Proxy-Connection: Keep-Alive
> 
< HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
< Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
< X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
< Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025 17:10:28 GMT
Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025 17:10:28 GMT
< Content-Length: 75
Content-Length: 75

< 
dial tcp: lookup <destinationName>.dest on 100.64.0.10:53: no such host
* Connection #0 to host 127.0.0.1 left intact

 

I also created a .env file that should change the proxy settings:

destinations="[{"name": "<destinationName>","url": "http://<destinationName>.dest","proxyConfiguration":{"host": "127.0.0.1","port": 8887,"protocol":"http"}}]"

 

My destination looks like this:

The destination is created on subaccount level. 
After changing the destination i also called the reload request Andre mentioned in his blogpost.

My default-env.json and default-services.json files both contain the configuration to the destination, connectivity and xsuaa service I created for the app. The variables are created using the cf env myapp > .env command. 
I am quite sure the service is found. Removing the destination service from these files results in another error: "Could not find service binding of type 'destination'".

 

At this point I am very desperate in trying to start my app locally. 

Any help is appreciated, thank you already in advance!

entry.title: In RAP, Issue with BAPI Warning Message Handling in Unmanaged Save
entry.content:
I am working on an application in RAP, where I am using a managed scenario with an unmanaged save. In the save_modified method, I am calling a BAPI. The issue I am encountering is that the BAPI returns a warning, along with success and other informational messages. However, when the pop-up appears, it only shows the warning message.

When I click "Create," the process runs again, and on the second attempt, it displays all the messages together. This behavior is frustrating because the VBELN (sales document number) is generated twice. I am unsure if this is a bug or if there is an issue with the code.

I have attached both screenshots for your reference. Any guidance or assistance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Can we use open source libraries with RAP or CAP ?
entry.content: I want to use an open source library such as moment.js in RAP application , Is it possible ?

entry.title: Plant maintenance notification
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can we create SAP PM notification using android mobile in fiori s/4 hana public cloud.

please guide me.

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: How to create cost center custom fields using bapi
entry.content:
Hi experts,

How to create cost center custom fields using BAPI.

I have tried many ways but couldn't able to identify.could you please help me to resolve.

entry.title: No data being read from SAP Gateway Demo Server - ES5 from GWSAMPLE_BASIC service
entry.content:
Hi,

I've created a new workspace and a new project within the workspace.

But, no data is being read from SAP Gateway Demo Server - ES5 from GWSAMPLE_BASIC service.

Can you please help?

entry.title: Custom Value Help Creation For a Particular Field In SAP RAP.
entry.content:
This blog is about implementing value help using custom entity.

This is one of the way to implement value help.

Introduction 

 In SAP RAP (Restful ABAP Programming), a custom entity refers to a user-defined data model that represents business data specific to your needs. It’s typically created using Core Data Services (CDS) views and exposed as an OData service for consumption in applications like Fiori.

Custom entities in RAP empower developers to create tailored data models that fit unique business scenarios while easily integrating with SAP's cloud and UI platforms.

The custom entity provides a structure and implements the logic via an ABAP class. The entity itself does not contain any data but must always be called by the SADL framework first. This is why custom entities are mainly used in RAP applications.

In this blog we will make Value help for Status field In our RAP Project.

Final Output :-

 

 

Implementation

In the first step, we begin by creating the Core Data Service and the ABAP class.

1. Class

Since the class in the annotation is also checked when the custom entity is created, we implement the empty class first.

To do this, we create the class and use the interface IF_RAP_QUERY_PROVIDER, which expects the custom entity.

 

 

CLASS zcl_status_query DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    INTERFACES if_rap_query_provider .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.


CLASS zcl_status_query IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.
* write logic here


  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

2. Core Data Service

In the next step, we create the Core Data Service using the context menu. We use the CDS template "defineCustomEntityWithParameters" as a template:-

 

 

 Now Add This annotation at CDS

 

@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_STATUS_QUERY'

 

Now We will create two fields:

  • First we create a status field with appropriate data type. In this we will enter the description of the status field.
  •  The next field is the short description of the status. ( ex: N   = New ).

Since we are using built-in data types, we also set the label and tooltip for the user so that the texts appear in the UI.

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Value Help cds for status data element'
@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_STATUS_QUERY'
define custom entity ZCDi_status_VH
{
    @EndUserText.label: 'Status'
    @EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Currently available status'
    key status : abap.char(10);
    
    @EndUserText.label: 'Status(Short)'
    @EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Short Name for the status'
    Status_short : abap.char(1);
     
}

 

We have now created the basic elements that we need for the search help. In this section we implement the necessary logic to see data in the UI.

 To do this, we bind the search help to the field in the projection view.

 

   @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: 'ZCDI_STATUS_VH', element: 'status' } }]
      Status,

 

Since value help must also be released externally, you should include the view in your service definition.

(NOTE: Expose only if you did association with the custom CDS. In this case we will do ) .

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Employee table service defination'
define service Zsd_empheader {
  expose zcdp_Empheader;
  expose zcdp_address;
  expose zcdp_items;
  expose ZCDi_status_VH;
}

 

3. Extending the previously defined class

Let's now extend the query class with the logic we need to be able to use the value help easily. To do this, we need an internal table with the data type of the custom entity. We fill this with the appropriate data

 

    DATA: lt_create TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF  zcdi_status_vh WITH EMPTY KEY.

    lt_create = VALUE #( ( status = 'New'         Status_short = 'N' )
                          ( status = 'Completed'  Status_short = 'C' )
                           ( status = 'Invalid'   Status_short = 'I' )
                            ( status = 'Pending'  Status_short = 'P' )
     ).

 

 

To return the data, we still have to call the appropriate REPSONSE methods. Here it is important to only call the methods if the framework requests it, otherwise an error will occur. Therefore, we first ask whether the fields have been requested and then call the method. It is also important that the two methods must always be implemented and should not, for example, be in a TRY/CATCH, where they may not be called if an error occurs.

 

    IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).
      io_response->set_data( lt_create ).
    ENDIF.

    IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_create ) ).
    ENDIF.

 

In addition to this method, we also must call the GET_PAGING method, for which we receive a similar error. The call to the methods must be implemented within the method call.

 

    io_request->get_sort_elements( ).
    io_request->get_paging( ).

 

Complete Class will look like this.

CLASS zcl_status_query DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    INTERFACES if_rap_query_provider .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS zcl_status_query IMPLEMENTATION.


  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.

    DATA: lt_create TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF  zcdi_status_vh WITH EMPTY KEY.

    lt_create = VALUE #( ( status = 'New'         Status_short = 'N' )
                          ( status = 'Completed'  Status_short = 'C' )
                           ( status = 'Invalid'   Status_short = 'I' )
                            ( status = 'Pending'  Status_short = 'P' )
     ).


    IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).
      io_response->set_data( lt_create ).
    ENDIF.

    IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_create ) ).
    ENDIF.

    io_request->get_sort_elements( ).
    io_request->get_paging( ).

  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

Now  we have to associate our custom CDS with the root CDS where status field is present and expose the custom status entity.

 

association  to ZCDi_status_VH   as _status       on  $projection.Status = _status.status.

*expose it
_status,

 

  • status -> Field in the custom entity.
  • Status -> field in the root CDS.
  •  

Result :-

 

On Clicking value help , value help window will appear.

 

On clicking to the required status, it will populate In the field.

entry.title: currency_conversion() function is showing error for cds view entity.
entry.content:
I've created a cds view entity( define view entity <view_name>) with some elements and added currency_conversion() function to convert currency from 'USD' to 'EUR' it is showing error as-
ZD_TRAVEL_2-AUDCURR reference information missing or data type wrong, see long text ZD_TRAVEL_2 

-------- Same code is not showing error for cds view i.e., define view <view_name>

entry.title: How can i expose my BTP CAPM application built with nodejs to external system
entry.content:
Hi

I want to create a CAPM application which will create database entries into Postgresql (BTP backing service) and read data from postgresql DB.  I want this application to be accessible from ABAP system (through request parameter i need to perform DB operations).

Thanks 

Shankar

entry.title: OData service for Fiori Analytical Table - sap.ui.table.AnalyticalTable
entry.content:
Hello dear experts,

I'm looking for information, documentation, tutorials, anything that clarify how to build or annotate an OData service for the Fiori Analytical Table control:

https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-web/analytical-table-alv/

I would like to expose data from one simple custom Z table in an S/4HANA on premise backend. The approach would ideally be using RAP, but any suggestions are welcome.

 

Thanks a lot!

Best regards,
Douglas

entry.title: Inheriting anotations from ABAP CDS Views
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to get the text descriptions from the existing CDS that I am referring in my custom ABAP CDS. The underlying cds is I_SalesDocumentItem and this has all the annotations for the characteristics needed such as material, various reason codes, statuses etc. 

In my Custom CDS at the top there is a declaration and I set it as false.

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: false

...

In the CDS definition I am using the association like below

select from I_SalesDocumentBasic as _HDR

association [0..*] to I_SalesDocumentItem as _Item on _Item.SalesDocument = _HDR.SalesDocument

and in the body of the cds I do have foreign key annotation 

@ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_SalesOrganization'

_HDR.SalesOrganization,

 

at the end of the CDS I have association added as well...

_Item.

 

In SAC after exposing the CDS thru Composite and Consumption layer, the SalesOrganization

does not show description though the dimension display is set as 'ID and Description' option.

 

But when I use explicitly define an association in the CDS and use the annotation

@ObjectModel.foreignkey.association for another object it shows description in SAC from teh same CDS.

 

Is there anyway I can inherit the text descriptions from the existing CDS rather than redoing allover again?

 

Let me know how to resolve this..

 

thanks,

Arthur.

entry.title: How to add 'Additional filter option s4 standard event'
entry.content:
Hi,

I could extend the payload of event mesh for business partner as described below video.

" Extending SAP S/4HANA Cloud events with RAP and event filtering plus dynamic topics in S4HC "

but It failed to add the filter option in S4 hana on-premise. 

Position is not available in S4 Hana -on premise .

Can you please help on this?

Thanks,

Rehan
